characters.name: Adaline Seyah Simms
characters.description: "Lady of the Land, Daughter of the Nine, Protector of the Soil and Sea." - Kaster Adaline Seyah Simmsis a recurring character appearing inSeason 1andSeason 2ofKilljoys. She is portrayed by actressJayne Lewis.

characters.name: Allen
characters.description: Allenis a character appearing inSeason 4ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorRandy Thomas. Allen is aQreshinoble who is coming up on the end of his ten year marriage contract. He attended aTenyer Retreatto determine if he would renew his marriage contract.[1]

characters.name: Alvis Akari
characters.description: "You are a creepy little dude" - D'avin "Thank you" - Alvis Alvis Akariwas a recurring character appearing inSeason 1,Season 2, andSeason 3ofKilljoys. Alvis could be considered a masochist as a Scarback, though he tells Dutch that he discovered he was only into consensual pain. He gives off a wise air while retaining an understated sense of humor. He could be considered to be charismatic as he has several followers and is viewed as a spiritual leader. He is intelligent as he was able to work his way out of the tunnels of Old Town and become a leader of the rebellion.

characters.name: Ancient Scarback
characters.description: TheAncient Scarbackis a character appearing inSeason 2ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorJulian Richings. The AncientScarbackwas one ofTwelvethat went toArkynto fight thePra-tal.[1] The monk was found byDutch,D'avin, andAlvisin a 200-year old lab buried beneath theRed 17facility on Arkyn. He and the others of his group were experimented on byAneela. The Monk recognized Dutch as the Pra-tal, mistaking her for Aneela, and attacked. Although the three questioned the monk, they we able to gain little information from him. Being in great pain, the monk asked Dutch to finish the fight started 200 years earlier and kill him, which she did using aDreadnought.

characters.name: Aneela
characters.description: Queen of the Quad Planetary System Aneela Kin Ritis a recurring character appearing inSeason 2,Season 3,Season 4, andSeason 5ofKilljoys. She is portrayed by actressHannah John-Kamenand byJordana Blakeas a child. When Aneela became Hullen, she retained her free will but became emotionally unstable, with her impulse control destroyed. This caused her to act out, often violently. She desired to find a way to fix herself and to understand why she was so different from the other Hullen, which led her to begin the Red 17 experiments. Aneela also has an extreme fear of being alone and a poor understanding of human social cues due to being locked away by Khlyen for hundreds of years.

characters.name: Angry Woman
characters.description: TheAngry Womanis a character appearing inSeason 2ofKilljoys. She is portrayed by actressYahsmin Daviault. The Angry Woman is a resident ofOld TownonWesterley. She survived thebombing of Old Townand the subsequentExecution Eugenicsprogram used byThe Companyon the town.[1]

characters.name: Angry Woman
characters.description: TheAngry Womanis a character appearing inSeason 2ofKilljoys. She is portrayed by actressYahsmin Daviault. The Angry Woman is a resident ofOld TownonWesterley. She survived thebombing of Old Townand the subsequentExecution Eugenicsprogram used byThe Companyon the town.[1]

characters.name: Artura Senbek
characters.description: Artura Senbekis a character appearing inSeason 2ofKilljoys. She is portrayed by actress Oluniké Adeliyi. Artura Senbekis aCompanyengineer that worked on the project to develop theContainment Fencetechnology that is used to wall offOld Town. She worked to build theAfferent Teleplasticityfunctions of the fence.[1] She was sent to Greenwell with a team of scientists, behaviorists, and engineers to test the wall. The observed that the old, sick, the very young all died in one day. Like the Company wascullinga herd.[2]

characters.name: Arune Hyponia
characters.description: Arune Hyponiais a character appearing inSeason 2ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorShamier Anderson. Arune Hyponia is one of the leading members ofLand Hyponia, one ofthe Ninefamilies onQresh. He is a member of the Council of the Nine and allied withPawter SimmsofLand Simms.[1] Arune opposesLand Kendryand seeks to find proof ofDelle Seyah Kendry'sinvolvementin the assassination of half of his family through the use of aGenetic Bomb.

characters.name: Banyon Grey
characters.description: Banyon Greyis a recurring character appearing inSeason 3andSeason 4ofKilljoys. She is portrayed by actressKaren LeBlanc. Banyon Grey is the leader of aRACOversight Team. She and her team were sent to investigate the large number ofRAC agentsthat have gone missing in a mass defection with no signs of foul play inthe Quad.[1]

characters.name: Bea
characters.description: Bea, is a recurring character appearing inSeason 4of Killjoys. She is portrayed by actressMercedes Morris. Bea is an inhabitant of theDebtor's Colonyin the Alcador Cluster. She is paying off her debtor by acting as an organ harvesting host.[1]

characters.name: Bea
characters.description: Bea, is a recurring character appearing inSeason 4of Killjoys. She is portrayed by actressMercedes Morris. Bea is an inhabitant of theDebtor's Colonyin the Alcador Cluster. She is paying off her debtor by acting as an organ harvesting host.[1]

characters.name: Bedros Martell
characters.description: Bedros Martellis a character appearing inSeason 1ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorGeorge Tchortov. Bedros Martell owns ahokkfarm onLeith, which is all that is left of his family's ancestral property. Bedros's father was the youngest son of a family ofQreshilandowners and by the time he came of age his share of the family's ancestral lands were mostly underwater. Bedros's father sold or traded what was left of his family property on Qresh in exchange for a parcel of farmland on Leith, which he used to start a hokkery. Bedros inherited the hokkery from his father. Martell Farm Business Records

characters.name: Beefy Son
characters.description: The Beefy Son is a character appearing inSeason 1ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorDan Warry-Smith. He grew up inSugar Pointand survived the bombing of the town bythe Company. He and his family were friends withR'yoandSimon Muraayn's family when they were young and took the brother and sister in after their parents were killed in the bombing. Now He struggles to live in the ruins of the city, doing his best to protect hismother, who is addicted toJakk, and avoid the scavengers and gang members that rule the desolate area.[1]

characters.name: Beggar
characters.description: TheBeggaris a character appearing inSeason 2ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorR.D. Reid. The Beggar is a criminal inOld TownonWesterley. Although many people believe he is distillingHokk 9, he is actually bootlegging liquid explosives.[1] He was arrested byD'avinandJohn Jaqobisunder aRACissuedwarrant.

characters.name: Behemoth
characters.description: Behemothis a character appearing inSeason 1ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorMatt Taylor. Behemoth is the leader of a scavenger gang inSugar PointonWesterley.  His group shot downLucywhile flying over Sugar Point and attempted to break into the ship to plunder its technology.John Jaqobiswas able to outsmart and defeat the scavengers, and scavenge a part off their vehicle in order to repair Lucy.[1] Behemoth himself was killed with a plasma torch in a brawl withJohnny.

characters.name: Bellus Haardy
characters.description: Bellus Haardyis a recurring character appearing inSeason 1andSeason 2ofKilljoys. She is portrayed by actressNora McLellan. Bellus Haardy was a topKilljoywho then became a warrant broker onLeith. She maintains her office in theLeith Bazaar. She acts as a broker forDutch and her teamand informedDutchthat she had taken aKill Warranteven though Dutch did no such thing.[1]When it becomes clear thatJohn Jaqobistook a kill warrant above his rank she puts two and two together but doesn't report him to theRAC. When Dutch doesn't complete the Kill Warrant she smacks Dutch on the head to knock some sense into her. She tells Dutch that she could turn Johnny in or better yet complete the kill warrant. When Dutch explains the situation Bellus is sympathetic and gives Dutch information that could help save her and D'avin. Though she espouses the belief that Johnny is too soft to be in their line of work. Bellus is as tough as nails, sarcastic and isn't afraid to tell it like it is. She does have a soft spot for Dutch though as she is unhappy whenD'avin Jaqobis"hurts her girl".[8]
characters.personality_section: Bellus is as tough as nails, sarcastic and isn't afraid to tell it like it is. She does have a soft spot for Dutch though as she is unhappy whenD'avin Jaqobis"hurts her girl".[8]

characters.name: Benji Fuchs
characters.description: Benjiis a recurring character appearing inSeason 3ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorLuc Trottier. Benji is employed as a laboratory technician for theReclamation Apprehension Coalition. He was tested, along withZephandMcAvoy, byDutchandD'avinin order to see if he had the skills necessary to become a RAC field agent. Although he was really interested in field duty, he was encouraged by his friend McAvoy and passed the test.[1]

characters.name: Big Borna
characters.description: Big Bornais a recurring character appearing inSeason 2andSeason 3ofKilljoys. She is portrayed by actressNatasha Bromfield. Big Borna is a leader of a frontier tent settlement in theSalt PlainsofWesterleynearOld Town.[1]She leads her people with a firm hand and makes the most of every trade for the betterment of the settlement. A trader at heart, she will deal in any commodity, including people, that will turn a profit.[2]Anyone who is taken captive by the residents of the settlement need only beat Big Borna in arm wrestling to win their freedom.[3] Salt Plains settlement

characters.name: Big Joe
characters.description: Big Joeis a character appearing inSeason 1andSeason 4ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorTony Nappo. Joseph “Big Joe” Cyano is one of the topReclamation Agentsinthe Quad, RAC# C-5531 A-10177-0713-M. Big Joe was a sniper and expert survivalist, and a mentor to many Killjoys includingDutch. Once the youngest Killjoy to reach Level 5 rank, he was the oldest to retain it. Towards the end of his career he became a thief and gun runner, supplyingweaponsto theTrue Leithians. Eventually he had aLevel 5 Warrantplaced on him when he was 52 years old, resulting in his death at the hand ofFancy Lee.[1]

characters.name: Big Shady Westerlyn
characters.description: Big Shadyis a character appearing inSeason 1ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorRogue Johnston. Big Shady is a member of a group of criminals, led byKal Csoort, that robbed aWesterleyimmigration center inOld Town, killing two guards in the process. The gang stole 1000Seventh Generation Accordclaim identification packets with the intent of selling them so that people who had not met the Accord requirements could claim land onLeith.[1] He and the others of his gang were confronted by CaptainHector Feraanzinthe Royaleduring aBlack Rainstorm. Big Shady was eventually killed byJohn Jaqobiswith a rivet gun after he and his gang held the occupants of the Royale hostage.

characters.name: Black Root
characters.description: TheBlack Rootare theHullensecret police forLevel 6 Agents.  They are assigned to keep Level 6 agents in line, terminating them when necessary.[1]Black Root officers are deadly in any situation and carry a stun baton and aDreadnoughtfor use against Level 6 agents. Black Root officers support theRed 17program and started as Level 6 agents themselves.

characters.name: Bleeding Dancer
characters.description: TheBleeding Danceris a character appearing inSeason 2ofKilljoys. She is portrayed by actressNatalie Sebastien. The Bleeding Dancer is a resident ofOld TownonWesterley. She survived thebombing of Old Townbut during the subsequentExecution Eugenicsprogram used byThe Companyon the town she fell under the influence of the behavior modification resonances delivered by theContainment Fence, dancing in the streets on broken glass that made her feet bleed.[1]

characters.name: Broken Man
characters.description: TheBroken Manis a character appearing inSeason 2ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actor Carson Durven. The Broken Man is a resident ofOld TownonWesterley. He survived thebombing of Old Townbut was fatally injured during the subsequentExecution Eugenicsprogram used byThe Companyon the town.[1]

characters.name: Bruxton
characters.description: Bruxtonis a character appearing inSeason 2ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorJake Michaels. Bruxton is a member of the security forces forLand KendryofThe Nine, he is a personal body guard forDelle Seyah Kendry.[1]

characters.name: Bruxton
characters.description: Bruxtonis a character appearing inSeason 2ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorJake Michaels. Bruxton is a member of the security forces forLand KendryofThe Nine, he is a personal body guard forDelle Seyah Kendry.[1]

characters.name: Brynn
characters.description: Brynnis a recurring character appearing inSeason 3ofKilljoys. She is portrayed by actressKalinka Petrie. Brynn is aHullenaboard theBlack Root Cruiser. She isAneela'sattenadant and sees to her needs[1], however her primary task is to observe Aneela's experiements and behavior and report toGanderand ultimatelyThe Lady.[2]

characters.name: Brynn

characters.name: Buck Welnar
characters.description: Buck Welnaris a character appearing inSeason 2ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actorTyler McMaster. Buck Welnar was a prisoner in the Blue Unit ofWesthole Prison.[1] After thebombing of Old Town, a Company ship was shot down and crashed into Westhole Prison, breaching the Blue Unit and enabling Welnar andTarren Tighmonto escape.Dutch,Johnny, andD'avinaccepted a warrant to find Tighmon, Welnar and several other escaped prisoners. They found Welnar inThe Royale, and while they tried to get him to provide the location where Tighmon would be found, he shot himself in the head to preventThe Companyfrom torturing him for the information.

characters.name: Campbell
characters.description: Campbellis a character appearing inSeason 2ofKilljoys. He is portrayed by actor Karl Campbell. Campbellis a criminal who frequentsEulogy, an outlaw barter town onWesterley.[1]
